LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LARRY CHEW'S NOTICE TO VACATE TENTATIVE RULING ON HEARING HELD MARCH 30, 2011. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED - THE COURT SUA SPONTE VACATES THE 3/30/11 AND 4/20/11 RULINGS. THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE HEARING ON 3/30/11 SHOULD NOT HAVE GONE FORWARD BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAD FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED THE PARTIES PRIOR FILINGS AND PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO FILE A 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE HIS 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS FROM TODAY (07/26/11). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

Notice To Vacate Tentative Ruling On Hearing Held Mar-30-11
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF LARRY CHEW'S NOTICE TO VACATE TENTATIVE RULING ON HEARING HELD MARCH 30, 2011.

APPEARANCES: Larry Chew, 467-6285 pltf & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - THE COURT SUA SPONTE VACATES THE 3/30/11 AND 4/20/11 RULINGS. THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE HEARING ON 3/30/11 SHOULD NOT HAVE GONE FORWARD BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAD FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT HAS REVIEWED THE PARTIES PRIOR FILINGS AND PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO FILE A 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE HIS 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS from today (07/26/11). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
